texto: Pete says that his online marriage is an essential part of his "life mix." I ask him about this expression. I have never heard it before. Pete explains that the life mix is the mash-up of what you have on- and offline. Now, we ask not of our satisfactions in life but in our life mix. We have moved from multitasking to multi-lifing.
autor: Alone Together Why We Expect More from Technology and Less from Each Other
explicacao: Citação de Alone Together Why We Expect More from Technology and Less from Each Other sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Pete says that his online marriage is an essential part of his "life mix." I ask him about this e…” articula reflexao, psychology, technology em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como casamento e technology.

texto: The very fact that we now design and manufacture robot companions for the elderly marks a turning point. We ask technology to perform what used to be "love's labor": taking care of each other.
